name: TJ Johnson
title: Creative Technical Leader
tagline: Builder of immersive experiences. Maker of memories that last a lifetime.
summary: Innovative project and production leader with 20+ years at The Walt Disney Company — blending technical program management, interactive content strategy, and R&D execution to deliver guest-first experiences at scale.
coreStatement: I have always loved building fun and unique experiences for people. I want to innovate, produce, and create.
